overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a hooded protagonist walking through ancient Alexandria. The character traverses marble terraces with classical columns, enters a library filled with scholars, and explores a decorated courtyard with reflecting pools and canopy structures overlooking the city and sea.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated marble terrace with cypress trees overlooking ancient city

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along marble terrace with cypress trees on the left and city views on the right

entered.detail: large stone doorway frame marking the exit from interior space
tall narrow evergreen trees lining the terrace edge
polished marble tiles with geometric patterns
distant view of ancient city with buildings and lighthouse
tall stone columns with red painted bases supporting overhead structure
low stone wall separating terrace from drop-off

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from a stone doorway onto an elevated marble terrace lined with tall cypress trees on the left. Classical columns with red bases line the right side, framing a panoramic view of the ancient city and distant lighthouse under bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: terrace with classical statues approaching library entrance

agents.ego_description: walking past marble statues toward large blue decorated doors

notable_agents.action: standing near the building entrance ahead

entered.detail: classical marble statue of robed figure on pedestal
tall blue wooden doors with gold circular decorations
large ornamental urn on pedestal between columns

segments.scene_description: Moving along the terrace, the character passes a marble statue and approaches a grand building entrance marked by large blue decorated doors. The cypress trees fall behind as the path opens toward the building facade.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient library interior with scholars studying at tables

events.description: enters building through large blue doors into dimly lit library interior
exits library through opposite doors back to outdoor courtyard

agents.ego_description: walking through library past scholars working at tables with scrolls and books

standing near tall wooden bookshelves lining the walls

entered.detail: floor-to-ceiling wooden shelves filled with scrolls and books
long tables with scattered scrolls, quills, and writing materials
stone columns supporting the interior ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dimly lit library through the blue doors, walking between tall wooden bookshelves and past scholars seated at tables studying scrolls. The space is filled with ancient texts and writing materials before exiting to a bright courtyard.

scene_state.functional_zone: courtyard with central reflecting pool and scattered debris

events.description: passes through area with scattered debris and broken pottery on marble floor

agents.ego_description: walking through courtyard past central pool and scattered debris

notable_agents.action: walking across the courtyard toward the right side

entered.detail: rectangular pool of water reflecting the sky and columns
marble tiles with scattered patches of grass and dirt
tall palm tree growing in the courtyard center
broken pottery, cloth, and organic matter scattered on ground
shards of ceramic vessels and amphorae

segments.scene_description: Exiting the library, the character enters a sunlit courtyard featuring a central reflecting pool surrounded by marble columns. The ground shows signs of neglect with scattered debris and broken pottery as a few people walk through the space.

scene_state.functional_zone: open terrace with canopy structures overlooking city and sea

events.description: enters open terrace area with white fabric canopies and gold fixtures

agents.ego_description: walking through decorated terrace with canopy structures toward overlook

notable_agents.action: sitting on cushions under the white canopy

entered.detail: flowing white fabric draped between golden posts creating shade
ornate golden finials and decorations on canopy posts
large stone fire bowls on pedestals
view of the sea and coastline beyond the terrace
colorful cushions and rugs arranged on the floor
large patterned rug covering marble floor

segments.scene_description: The character enters a grand open terrace adorned with flowing white fabric canopies supported by golden fixtures. The space offers panoramic views of the city and sea, with scattered cushions and decorative rugs suggesting a place of rest or celebration.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, elevated terrace through a scholarly interior and into a lavish open-air pavilion. It begins as the character emerges from a stone doorway onto a marble terrace lined with cypress trees and classical columns, framing a panoramic view of the city and its distant lighthouse under a midday sun. As the character moves past a marble statue, the path opens toward a grand building facade before transitioning through large blue decorated doors into the dim, quiet atmosphere of a library filled with wooden bookshelves and studying scholars. The scene then shifts back into the light as the character exits into a sunlit courtyard featuring a central reflecting pool and scattered debris among marble columns. Finally, the camera glides into a grand open terrace adorned with flowing white fabric canopies and golden fixtures, overlooking the expansive city and sea.
